headline: Jim Cramer on Workday: “An Old Favorite, But Not Anymore”
summary: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY) is one of the S&P 500 stocks that Jim Cramer shared his take on. Noting the CEO change, Cramer commented: The fifth-worst performer in February was Workday, an old favorite, but not anymore. It was down 23.8%. This one’s an actual enterprise software company focused on platforms for human resources and finance. […]

headline: The French AI startup gunning for Workday, Oracle, and SAP
summary: Fortune has exclusively learned that Eléonore Crespo’s Pigment is approaching $100 million in ARR, having doubled ARR for a third consecutive year.

headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Edge Lower On Stubborn Inflation Jitters
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Wednesday, Mar, 4 2026 US stock futures are pointing slightly lower this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 contracts down about 0.2% and futures tied to the Nasdaq 100 off roughly 0.3%, as investors weigh stubborn inflation worries against strong signals from Asia. The US 10 year government bond yield is holding steady, which indicates the cost of borrowing is not easing yet and expectations for interest rate cuts are being pushed further out. At the...

headline: After SaaSocalypse And Cybersecurity Sell Off, This $15 Billion Sector Could Be The Next Target
summary: BofA Global Research has warned that artificial intelligence (AI) disintermediation could put over $15 billion of the insurance industry at risk.

headline: Workday (WDAY) Climbs 7.2% on Bargain-Hunting
summary: We recently published The 10 Biggest Winners in a Bloody Market. Workday Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY) was one of the best performers on Tuesday. Workday rallied for a second day on Tuesday, surging 7.16 percent to finish at $143.61 apiece as investors appeared to have hunted for bargains. This followed the stock’s 24 percent drop in the […]
